events.description: Flash flood destroys embankment in Sector 4.

events.text: BREAKING: Sector 4 Embankment Breach. Evacuation ordered.

events.description: Emergency funding re-allocated to urban centers.

events.text: This plan prioritizes the industrial zone while leaving the downstream fishing villages completely exposed.
Your proposal for local sandbagging is insufficient for the current flow rate; we need structural reinforcement.

finalProposals.TEAM_A: Prioritized protection of critical infrastructure (Power Plant, Highway) with managed flooding of agricultural polders.
finalProposals.TEAM_B: Decentralized disaster response and mobile medical units for remote villages.

judgingNotes: Government focused on macro-economic stability; Community focused on immediate survival. Lack of common ground on fund allocation.
